feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: There's No You Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,017Chapters: 2/30Kudos: 9

Summary: “Where are you driving from?” Eddie asked, his mouth moving before he could stop it, his brain deciding that awkward small talk was infinitely safer than just standing there vibrating with nervous energy. “East,” the guy replied with a casual, fluid roll of his broad shoulders. “Farther than I wanted to be, honestly. And definitely longer than I originally planned.” Before the army, before Los Angeles, and long before the 118, there was a dusty gas station on the edge of El Paso, a broken-down Jeep with Pennsylvania plates, and a stranger named Evan. For years, they were each other's entire world, surviving basic training, AIT, and a grueling deployment side-by-side. But a devastating wave of silence and a massive misunderstanding tore them apart, leaving behind a deep, soul-cutting ache and a history neither of them ever truly moved on from. Now, the past has finally caught up to the present. Standing under the harsh fluorescent lights of Station 118, Eddie and Evan are forced to navigate the wreckage of the life they left behind—and the terrifying truth of everything they never stopped running from.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Skin of Earth
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,096Chapters: 2/30Kudos: 28

Summary: It has been five months since the events at the reservoir, and life finally seems to have settled into a new norm for Buck and Eddie. Buck is thriving, as he learns to harness the potential in his new abilities, and Eddie as always is right by his side. At home, their bond is flourishing, as they use their down time to truly embrace being a family, while the chaos of work is keeping them on their toes, as the 118 officially embrace their advanced station status. All in all, life is pretty perfect. So what happens when an unwanted phone call, an unexpected opportunity, and an unprecedented storm suddenly upend everything, and set them on a path they never could have imagined. Along with new friends they meet along the way, join Buck and Eddie as they explore the magical world of the elements, and the bonds that tie them to it. - NOTE: It is strongly recommended that you read 'Part 1: Soul of Water' before starting this fic. Much of the world building, and plot points, may not make much sense otherwise.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the wisdom to know the difference
entry.summary:
Author: kryptonian

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,313Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 123

Summary: He fumbles for his phone, flicking open the app that records the date he got clean and how much time has passed. “Uh– Hi. I’m Buck, and I’m an addict. I’m five and a half months clean.” Almost creepily in sync, the room responds, “Hi, Buck.”Or: One of Buck's NA meetings.

entry.title: Ten Days To Tell You
entry.summary:
Author: railmehotchner

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,490Chapters: 10/11Kudos: 103

Summary: My advice is always ruin the friendship,Better that than regret it for all time,Should've kissed you anyway.And my advice is always answer the question,Better that than to ask it all your life,Should've kissed you anyway. Brain cancer, the words feel foreign yet all too familiar. It’s a death sentence. Maybe not now but eventually he knows it will be. After everything he’s lived through, all the fantastical and downright bizarre situations he’s found himself in, this is what’s finally gonna get him. Something he can’t outrun no matter how hard he tries. Well, he’s done running. He’s done hiding. Maybe this could be the thing that finally frees him, as sick as it feels to admit. Aka: After a sudden diagnosis, Eddie Diaz is left reeling with unanswered questions and what ifs. Ten days, that’s all he’s got. Ten days to decide if he’ll take the surgery and to come clean about the feelings he’s been experiencing for his best friend. A/N: Guys this fic means so much to me. Thank you to everyone who takes time out of their days to read my little stories. I love you all ❤️

entry.title: Sleep Don’t Come Easy
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,576Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 101

Summary: “I don’t need blankets, just you.” Buck mumbles. “I just need you.” Eddie lets out a breath of air. “Okay…”OrWhen it’s Eddie’s turn to watch Buck overnight, Buck gets cold and sleepily asks him to get in bed with him. Who is Eddie to refuse?

entry.title: Stop, Drop...and Grind?
entry.summary:
Author: FyrestoneSiren

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,888Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 250

Summary: It was supposed to be one charity show.One harmless, slightly raunchy firefighter-themed performance for a good cause. Then Buck pulled Eddie into a world of poles, suspenders, body oil, and smouldering tension that had no business being this hot. Two firefighters walk into a strip club. Only one walks out emotionally intact. (Spoiler: it’s not Eddie.) Originally posted: 10/07/2025 Re-edited and remastered: 06/06/2026

entry.title: slammed the door on my whole world
entry.summary:
Author: perfectlysunny

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,335Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 151

Summary: He knows he shouldn’t be here, this isn’t what they do anymore, he ruined this, but he can’t help it. He’s always been selfish when it comes to Buck anyway. He knocks softly and it’s almost magical to him how Buck appears.“Sorry, we don’t want to buy- Eddie?”“Hey Buck,” Eddie says. “Look I know you don’t want me to be here, but I just- I just wanted to give you this.”He holds out the casserole, and Buck takes it almost mechanically. He knows Buck is thinking about the last time they were in this position. He knows he’s thinking of wrapped wrists and red eyes. He knows he’s thinking of the sharp intake of breath and the loud click of the door, and no words spoken between them. He knows he’s thinking about it, because he is too. It’s out and too loud in the small space between them.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: When the Sirens Stop
entry.summary:
Author: trinbuckleydiaz

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,883Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Buck never expected a community barbecue for first responders to change his life. As a dispatcher, he knows the voices of hundreds of firefighters, paramedics, and police officers. Some he knows better than others. One voice, in particular, has become a familiar part of his shifts. Eddie Diaz never expected to recognize a stranger by the sound of his voice. One conversation leads to exchanged numbers, late-night texts, and a friendship neither of them saw coming. Somewhere between long shifts, radio calls, and the quiet moments after the sirens stop, Buck and Eddie find themselves becoming something more. Or: Dispatch Buck meets Firefighter Eddie at a barbecue, and neither of them is prepared for what happens next.

entry.title: Look at you go, crossin' state lines with your shadow
entry.summary:
Author: Sam_Stew

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,009Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 175

Summary: Buck glances down again, seeing yet again another unknown unknown number calling him, "I'll be right back," he explains, jutting his thumb back before rushing towards the bunk rooms to answer the call. "Is this Evan Buckley?" "Yes, this is he, is this about Connor again?" "Yes, now I am not the last person you will here with about this part of the will," he explains, "and you can wave your rights to Theo-" "Theo?" Buck asks "Yes, Theo Spencer he's left in your care in case of accident," – Or after Eddie leaves LA Buck gets a call from a lawyer - Aka 8B and S9 with Bobby and Theo

entry.title: Let Me Worship These
entry.summary:
Author: wei_timo

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,049Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: Eddie’s gaze felt like a physical touch, trailing from the hem of the hoodie, down the line of Buck’s torso, to linger on the way the sweatpants clung. Buck could practically feel the weight of that stare on his thighs. He knew what it did to Eddie. The arms Buck worked so hard for were for show, for strength. But his thighs? They were Eddie’s secret weakness. or Eddie Diaz has a thigh kink and wants to worship Buck.

entry.title: I watched you fall, and I did nothing.(He couldn't even call for help.)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiecokkieta

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,867Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 82

Summary: After the team's private lives were laid bare—and after Buck, realizing he had hurt his family in a way he never could have foreseen, withdrew his lawsuit—what transpired at the grocery store, and everything that followed... Happy endings aren't really my thing—I mean, I think they'll get over this lawsuit business pretty quickly.

entry.title: i don't want to wait another lifetime (to say yes)
entry.summary:
Author: martianbarnes

entry.title: swore on the bottle, baby, i'd never leave you
entry.summary:
Author: perfectlysunny

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,470Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 34

Summary: He first met the beautiful stranger on a Friday night in a dive bar near Fort Carson, Colorado. “Hi,” The man said, leaning over the counter at him with a slight smirk. “Tequila, please.” “Evan,” Evan blurts out, handing him his drink. Their fingers brush, sparks tingling down Evan's wrist at the touch, as the stranger takes it with a wink. “Hi Evan, I’m Eddie.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: what everyone already sees in us
entry.summary:
Author: viva_la_pictochat

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,502Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 81

Summary: "Has no one seriously ever come up to you assuming that until this week? It happens all the time. A few months ago you were helping a little old lady with something, I don’t remember what, but she told me I found a keeper.” He tried thinking about it, but nothing was coming to him, so he just huffed in response. Honestly, the fact that this seemed to be a regular occurrence that he was just now finding out about was bringing up some harder questions he’d been avoiding.“Did you correct them?”“No. Did you correct them in the diner?”“No.” He didn’t correct the sheriff either.But then, there was a difference between being seen as domestic and being seen having a domestic.AKA - Our boys finally discuss all the times they've been mistaken for a couple; well, Buck tells him because apparently the diner incident is the first time Eddie has ever been made aware of it. Hope this doesn't make him start rethinking any fundamental truths about himself or anything.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: garlic all the time. intimacy, occasionally
entry.summary:
Author: twoslicetoast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,003Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 294

Summary: “Alright,” Eddie shrugs, laissez-faire. He pulls Buck’s plate to the center of the table; pushes his own forward in kind. Then he begins a drawn-out circus routine of plucking an olive at a time up and out of the bowl and plopping them onto their respective dishes, one by one. The delicate, repetitive movement of Eddie’s pinched fingers reminds Buck of picking the petals off of flowers. He loves me. He loves me not. He love— An olive hits him square in the forehead. “There,” Eddie says, resolute, as the pitted projectile tumbles to the ground at Buck’s feet. “Equal treatment.”Or: Buck, Eddie, and the olive theory. Well, in theory.
